query:
INSERT INTO files (
            data,
            name,
            mime_type,
            created_at,
            committee_session_id,
            file_type
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        RETURNING
            id AS "id: FileId",
            data,
            name,
            mime_type,
            created_at AS "created_at: _",
            committee_session_id AS "committee_session_id: _",
            file_type AS "file_type: _"
